header.name: JAKKI CHAITANYA ESWAR RAJESH
header.title: AI Engineer  |  Azure Data Engineer  |  Python Developer

summary: Microsoft Certified Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203) with 4 years 10 months of hands-on IT experience building production Generative AI systems, voice AI pipelines, and cloud-scale ETL. Lead developer of AppNova AI, an enterprise full-stack multi-agent LLM platform (FastAPI, React/TypeScript, LangGraph, ChromaDB RAG) integrating Azure OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and Groq. Architected 30+ Azure Data Factory pipelines for U.S. government agencies, cutting data processing time by 50%. Available for remote or Hyderabad-based AI Engineer and Azure Data Engineer roles.

skills.AI & LLMs: LangChain, LangGraph, Multi-Agent Orchestration, RAG, Prompt Engineering, Azure OpenAI, OpenAI / GPT, Claude, Gemini, Groq (LLaMA 3), Ollama, Whisper, Hugging Face, Embeddings, NLP, ChromaDB Vector Search
skills.Cloud & Azure: Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure Data Lake Gen2, Azure SQL, Azure Key Vault, Power BI, Azure Logic Apps
skills.Data Engineering: ETL / ELT Design, ADF Mapping Data Flows, Cloud Migration (On-Prem to Azure), Data Warehousing, Data Validation, Data Modeling
skills.Programming: Python (Advanced), FastAPI, Flask, asyncio, Pydantic, SQL, REST APIs
skills.AI/ML Libraries: OpenCV, FFmpeg, MoviePy, scikit-learn, pandas, NumPy, PyTorch, python-docx, GFPGAN, DeblurGANv2
skills.DevOps & Tools: Azure DevOps Pipelines, GitHub Actions (CI/CD), Docker, Git, React (TypeScript/Vite), Angular

experience.title: AI Engineer & Azure Data Engineer
experience.company: West Advanced Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.

sections.heading: AI & GenAI Application Development
bullets: Architected AppNova AI, an enterprise full-stack multi-agent platform (FastAPI + React/TypeScript) with 13 LangGraph agents that analyse legacy codebases and generate modernisation reports as DOCX/PDF; integrated Azure OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and Groq with automatic fallback across 25+ API keys.
Refactored the codegen pipeline with parallel chunk waves and deterministic file_map backfill, increasing build-manifest generation speed by 20%.
Designed a ChromaDB-backed RAG pipeline with corpus deduplication and AST-based file summaries, retrieving code-relevant context in under 200ms regardless of project size.
Delivered AriesGPT, a 5-microservice AI platform including a production VoiceBot (Whisper STT → Groq LLaMA 3 → gTTS) with async FastAPI endpoints, structured JSON outputs, and escalation logic.
Deployed GovGenie, a RAG-powered RFP response generator (LangChain + ChromaDB), reducing bid-writing time by ~70%.
Automated a resume-to-DOCX system that replaced a 45-minute manual HR task with a 2-minute workflow, and shipped CI/CD via GitHub Actions for zero-downtime deploys.

sections.heading: Azure Data Factory & ETL Pipeline Engineering
bullets: Orchestrated 30+ production ADF pipelines for U.S. government clients (Contra Costa County, California State Agencies, LA County), ingesting high-volume RMS records into Azure SQL Database and Data Lake with zero data loss.
Accelerated data processing by 50% versus the prior manual batch process using Mapping Data Flows, Lookup activities, and parameterized Linked Services.
Reduced manual data-review effort by 40% by automating validation, deduplication, and transformation logic, with real-time pipeline health via Azure Monitor and Power BI reporting.
Led the ARIES cloud migration of a 40+ table criminal-justice system (multi-million rows) from on-prem SQL Server to Azure with a full lineage audit trail.
Maintained Linked Services, Integration Runtimes, and self-hosted IR configurations across Azure SQL, SFTP, REST, and Blob sources with secure credentials via Azure Key Vault.

prior_history.intro: The following section documents my background before entering the IT industry in 2021, included for employment-history completeness. These are non-IT positions.

roles.title: Career Transition & Self-Directed Learning
bullets: Pursued self-directed study in Python, SQL, and cloud data engineering, earning the Microsoft Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203) certification — the foundation for joining WATI in August 2021.

roles.title: Office Co-Ordinator
roles.company: Eastern Petro Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.
bullets: Managed quotations, purchase orders, and cross-departmental coordination reporting to the CEO.

roles.title: Process Associate
bullets: Handled U.S. solar-market cold calling and customer acquisition for Home Solar Solutions, West Palm Beach, Florida.

projects.name: AppNova AI
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Multi-Agent Code Modernisation Platform
projects.stack: FastAPI · React/TypeScript · LangGraph · Azure OpenAI · Claude · Gemini · ChromaDB · SSE
bullets: Pioneered a 13-agent LangGraph DAG that converts legacy codebases into runnable stacks with architecture diagrams, security audits, and DOCX/PDF reports.
Scaled throughput with SHA-256 content-fingerprint caching and SSE streaming, letting repeated uploads skip all LLM calls and serve cached results in seconds.

projects.name: AriesGPT
projects.subtitle: Angular + FastAPI AI Monorepo (Law-Enforcement Media Workflows)
projects.stack: Angular · FastAPI · GFPGAN · DeblurGANv2 · Whisper · ViT-GPT2 · Groq
bullets: Unified 5 independent AI microservices (VoiceBot, Video-to-Narrative, facial/vehicle deblur, conversational assistant) into a single Angular dashboard with env-based CORS isolation.
Streamlined an end-to-end voice assistant (Whisper STT → Groq LLaMA 3 → gTTS) with async FastAPI, confidence thresholds, and escalation handling for failed transcription.

projects.name: GovGenie
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered RFP Response Generator
projects.stack: FastAPI · Ollama (LLaMA 3.1) · LangChain · ChromaDB · Hugging Face
bullets: Cut government RFP writing from 5+ days to under 24 hours with a RAG system retrieving past proposal sections from ChromaDB and drafting responses section by section.

projects.name: Video to Narrative
projects.subtitle: Surveillance Video Summarisation App
bullets: Converted surveillance footage into law-enforcement incident summaries via OpenCV frame extraction, ViT-GPT2 captioning, Whisper transcription, and Groq LLaMA 3 JSON output.

projects.name: AI Content Bot
projects.subtitle: Fully Automated Daily AI/Tech Video Pipeline
projects.stack: Python · Gemini 2.5 Flash · Edge TTS · MoviePy · FFmpeg · YouTube & Instagram APIs · GitHub Actions
bullets: Automated a daily pipeline that turns trending RSS news into a 1080×1920 captioned video and publishes hands-free to YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels via GitHub Actions cron.
Added a Gemini auto-fix agent that, on pipeline failure, analyses the job log and source files and opens a patched pull request with no manual intervention.

projects.name: ModernizeAI
projects.subtitle: Multi-Stack AI App Generator
bullets: Generated stack-specific starter apps, data, and validation from an Angular configuration UI, packaging UI, middle-tier, and backend artifacts into downloadable ZIPs.
